title: Smoky Peanut Turkish Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful vegan-friendly brunch dish featuring smoky peanut seasoning and stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Increase heat to high. Add julienned carrots and bell pepper to the pan. Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Stir in peanut sauce, water, smoky peanut seasoning mix, and salt. Cook for an additional minute until the mixture thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or wrap in a whole-grain wrap with lettuce leaves for a complete meal.
